transcript: Absolue Gloss in Atelier Parisienne 213. Finish with the Via Belle fragrance to experience joyous femininity through this energizing perfume. When it's time to take it all off, shake to activate Bifacil Eye Makeup Remover. Pour onto a cotton pad until fully saturated and remove even the most stubborn makeup. Repeat as needed. Lancôme's Beauty Box is loaded with eight full-size products all wrapped up in a sustainable golden case made of 100% recycled materials.
